name: Enable logging (agents only)
body:
[{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Enable logging (agents only)"}], "data-id": "enable-logging-agents-only"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below are the steps required to enable logging in the various different tools used by the support team. Click on the link to view the details for that program."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this article:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#hardware", "children": [{"text": "Hardware Utility"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#pc-eftpos", "children": [{"text": "PC-EFTPOS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#offline-POS", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Hardware Utility"}], "data-id": "hardware-utility"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enable logging for the Hardware Utility:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Remote connect", "bold": true}, {"text": " into the computer (typically using Goto Assist)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "service folder", "bold": true}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Typically this is located at C:\Program Files (x86)\Retail Express\Retail Express Hardware Utility"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the "}, {"text": ".service ", "bold": true}, {"text": "folder"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the file "}, {"text": "nlog.config", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the Logging Level from "}, {"text": "Warn ", "bold": true}, {"text": "to "}, {"text": "Debug", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002449196/debug_level.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002449196/debug_level.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "debug_level.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Press the "}, {"text": "Windows + R ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Type in "}, {"text": "services.msc ", "bold": true}, {"text": "and click "}, {"text": "OK", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will open Windows Services"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"text": "Retail Express Hardware Service ", "bold": true}, {"text": "in the list"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002345415/hardware_service.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002345415/hardware_service.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "hardware_service.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Right click the service and select "}, {"text": "Restart", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Perform a transaction with the card that is causing a problem"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the file "}, {"text": "log.txt ", "bold": true}, {"text": "from the Hardware Utility "}, {"text": "Service ", "bold": true}, {"text": "folder opened in step 3"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "There should be an entry displaying the card type. The value that's displayed (CardType = 3.Credit in the screenshot below) should be added to our database mapping table."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002449256/hardware_logging.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002449256/hardware_logging.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "hardware_logging.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "PC-EFTPOS"}], "data-id": "pc-eftpos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "PC-EFTPOS is already enabled for basic logging, but you can enable deeper logging."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Log files are stored in C:\PC_EFT\EFTPOS000.LOG or C:\Program Files (x86)\PC_EFT.
Ver 5.0.6.0 has the program files directory; all others are just C:\PC_EFT."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To enable deeper logging:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the PC-EFTPOS client"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Locate the "}, {"text": "Tracing ", "bold": true}, {"text": "section at the bottom of the client"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure "}, {"text": "Host & POS ", "bold": true}, {"text": "are ticked"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	They will most likely be unticked"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Press "}, {"text": "Apply ", "bold": true}, {"text": "on the right-hand side"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Restart ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the PC-EFTPOS client"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reopen ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the PC-EFTPOS client"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Both Host & POS should be ticked"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review the log files with additional messages recorded"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Offline POS"}], "data-id": "offline-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Logging is done entirely via Serilog. However the client side/offline server logging is done to a rolling file written locally to disk on the offline server."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Logs are written by default to "}, {"text": "%ProgramData%\Retail Express\Offline POS\Logs", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Logs are kept for 7 days before being automatically deleted"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Each service has its own log"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The logging level is centrally located by a registry entry in "}, {"text": "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Retail Express\InstalledProducts\Offline POS\LoggingLevel ", "bold": true}, {"text": "with the value being the string representations used by Serilog:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Verbose - tracing information and debugging minutiae; generally only switched on in unusual situations"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Debug - internal control flow and diagnostic state dumps to facilitate pinpointing of recognised problems"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Information - events of interest or that have relevance to outside observers; the default enabled minimum logging level"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Warning - indicators of possible issues or service/functionality degradation"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Error - indicating a failure within the application or connected system"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Fatal - critical errors causing complete failure of the application"}]}]}]}]}]}]
